narrative:
Union Township M1M (precinct in Clermont County) has 778 registered voters, with 69.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a modest Republican lean of 4.2 percentage points.
